name: problem-list-panel
title: Problem List Panel
description: The patient's problem list as a dashboard panel — active problems first, resolved ones de-emphasized below. Composes WidgetPanel + ProblemListItem with a derived empty state.

props.name: items
props.description: Problems to render; each is a ProblemListItem's props (+ optional id).

props.name: ...WidgetPanel
props.description: title, icon, action, info, state, empty, footer, tone all pass through.

clinicalNotes: Ordering is clinical: active problems must lead so the reader sees what is currently being managed, with resolved/inactive retained but muted for context — this panel enforces that with `activeFirst`. Empty state is derived from `items` so an empty list reads as 'no problems recorded', never as a failed load. Pass `state="loading"|"error"` explicitly while fetching.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Patient Chart block (B-1).
